features: FRAGRANCE OIL GIFT BOX: 2 x 10ml amber glass bottles boxed. Great for giving as a gift or for use in those home-made candle, soap, wax melt, perfume, bath bomb projects.
HIGH QUALITY FINE FRAGRANCE: 100% pure and concentrated fragrance oils. They’re perfect for use in diffusers, potpourri, room sprays, Slime making. The creative list is endless!
CRUELTY FREE: All our oils are vegan friendly and there is zero testing on animals.
MADE IN THE UK: Aroma Energy offer quality you can trust. Our oils are lab tested (not on animals) and meet rigorous quality standards. All oils are IFRA Compliant.

SAFETY: Due to their strong nature, these oils should never be taken internally. These fragrance oils must be diluted with a carrier oil suitably before any use on skin. Please always do a patch test first.
